title: QSG - X button
scenario: Quick Start Guide X button does not close QSG and return to Device Settings screen consistently across all swipes/screens
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected Poly device to enter Device Settings.
3. In Device Settings, locate and tap the Quick Start Guide (QSG) option to open it.
4. Once the QSG page is displayed, tap the X button located in the upper right corner.
5. Repeat steps 3-4 after swiping to different screens/pages within the Quick Start Guide (e.g., swipe to the next page, then tap X).
expected: The Quick Start Guide page closes and the user is returned to the Device Settings screen. This behavior works consistently regardless of which screen/page within the QSG is currently displayed.
